    Index

    D F H I R 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    D

    dev.yanianz.star.inventory - package dev.yanianz.star.inventory
     

    F

    fitAll(Inventory, ItemStack[], int...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    This method works similar to InvUtils.fits(Inventory, ItemStack, int...) but allows this check to be done for multiple ItemStacks.
    fits(Inventory, ItemStack, int...) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    This method checks if an Item can fit into the specified slots.

    H

    hasEmptySlot(Inventory) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    Returns whether the Inventory has at least one empty slot

    I

    InvUtils - Class in dev.yanianz.star.inventory
     
    isEmpty(Inventory) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    This checks if the given Inventory is empty.
    isItemAllowed(Material, InventoryType) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    This checks if a given InventoryType accepts items of the given Material
    isValidStackSize(ItemStack, ItemStack, Inventory) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    This method checks both an ItemStack's and an Inventory's maxStackSize to determine if a given ItemStack can stack with another ItemStack in the given Inventory

    R

    removeItem(Inventory, int, boolean, Predicate) - Static method in class dev.yanianz.star.inventory.InvUtils
    This method removes a given amount of items from a given Inventory if they pass the given Predicate
